behaviors.reasoning: Static leakage detection on a prompt template is pure local validation logic.
Checking the fully assembled prompt requires real harness/template composition boundaries.
Verifying behavior source requires real plugin/skill loading and invocation wiring.
Running the same prompt against swapped skill-file variants is harness/config wiring, not model reasoning quality.
This is the true agentic check: behavior must change under the same prompt when skill content regresses.
Raw-output capture ordering is test-runner and parser pipeline wiring.
Structural assertion design can be validated deterministically without depending on model judgment.
Demonstrating superiority over keyword-only checks under live model output needs real model behavior.
